subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! Praise be to God that, through divine bounty, thou hast quaffed from the ocean of recognition and turned thy face toward the Most Exalted Horizon. God willing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حسن الحمد لله بعنایت الهی از بحر عرفان آشامیدی و بافق اعلی توجه نمودی انشاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @free will and predestination; fate
